description: workflows/emergency/confined-space-rescue/schema.yaml cited '산업안전보건법 Article 63 (밀폐공간 작업)'. Glossary confirms Art 63 = 'Ordering party's safety and health measures (도급인)', unrelated to confined-space work. The real confined-space article sits in a subordinate rule not initially indexed in legalize_kr/kr_safety.
